tools.name: search_skills
tools.description: Full-text search over the Skill of Skills directory (AI coding skills, plugins, MCP servers across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Windsurf, Cline). Results are ranked by the quality-first composite score, not popularity. By default only tools with quality ≥ 40 and risk below high are returned. Scores a

tools.name: get_skill
tools.description: Full quality profile for one tool by slug (slugs come from search_skills / get_collection): score breakdown, structural signals, risk level and reasons, platforms, repo link. Direct lookups return any active tool regardless of risk — the risk assessment is part of the answer, not a filter here.

tools.name: compare_tools
tools.description: Side-by-side quality profiles for 2–5 tools by slug. Same fields as get_skill; ordering follows the request, not rank.

tools.name: list_collections
tools.description: The curated buyer-intent collections (e.g. mcp-servers, testing-qa, browser-automation). Use get_collection for the ranked tools inside one.

tools.name: get_collection
tools.description: Quality-ranked tools inside one curated collection. Discovery gates apply: high/critical-risk tools are excluded unless include_high_risk is set.

tools.name: demand_pulse
tools.description: Public, k-anonymous demand signal from the directory: trending searches, most-saved and most-installed tools. Aggregates only — sourced from ≥5 distinct anonymous sessions per entry.
